PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(ROUND(?durationValue / 60) AS ?durationMinutes) WHERE {
  ?series a wd:Q224547 ; wdt:P266 wd:Q6946 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) <= 2018)
  ?game wdt:P155 ?series .
  ?game wdt:P2047 ?duration .
  ?duration wdt:P1128 ?durationValue .
}
ORDER BY ?durationValue
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2
